# GoFurry

> GoFurry is a bilingual furry-focused web directory and research site. It includes a navigation homepage for furry sites, a furry games index, an archive section, and an updates timeline.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://go-furry.com/) - Main furry site navigation homepage.
- [Games](https://go-furry.com/games) - Furry games index and discovery page.
- [Archive](https://go-furry.com/archive) - Archive and long-form reference content.
- [Updates](https://go-furry.com/updates) - Product, content, and maintenance update timeline.
- [About](https://go-furry.com/about) - Project overview and public contact information.

## Important Content Routes

- [Site Detail](https://go-furry.com/site/1) - Detail page pattern for a listed furry site. Replace the numeric ID with a real site ID.
- [Target Detail](https://go-furry.com/site/1/example.com) - Detail page pattern for a specific monitored target under a site. Replace both path parameters with real values.
- [Game Detail](https://go-furry.com/games/1) - Detail page pattern for a game entry. Replace the numeric ID with a real game ID.
- [Game Search](https://go-furry.com/games/search) - Search interface for game discovery.

## Site Notes For Language Models

- The site supports both Chinese and English. Prefer the page language currently shown to the user.
- Navigation entries, game records, and external links are index data; external site availability and metadata may change over time.
- Prefer canonical public pages over internal API endpoints when citing or summarizing the website.
- For security disclosure, see [security.txt](https://go-furry.com/.well-known/security.txt).

## Machine-Friendly Discovery

- [robots.txt](https://go-furry.com/robots.txt)
- [sitemap.xml](https://go-furry.com/sitemap.xml)
- [security.txt](https://go-furry.com/.well-known/security.txt)
